rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual editorial that explicitly contrasts a mitigation lens with prior marketing work focused on maximizing outcomes (e.g., sales/profits), and the cited paper is a major meta-analysis quantifying marketing’s impact on firm value—so it could plausibly serve as a key contrast/background source.
